description: Enterprise asset with full lifecycle management from procurement to disposal.
semantic_description: A physical, software, or intangible asset tracked from procurement through active use, maintenance, retirement, and disposal.
lifecycle_description: PROCURED → IN_USE → MAINTENANCE (↔ IN_USE) → RETIRED → DISPOSED

semantic_description: A category for classifying assets, supporting parent-child hierarchy for structured organization.

description: Planned and recurring maintenance schedule for assets.
semantic_description: A scheduled maintenance plan for an asset, defining frequency, next due date, and maintenance type.

description: Maintenance or repair work order for an asset.
semantic_description: A work order for asset maintenance, repair, or inspection. Tracks assignment, progress, and completion.

description: Monthly depreciation record for an asset.
semantic_description: A monthly depreciation entry for an asset, calculating book value reduction over the useful life period.
